description_long: This modern bungalow is set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a flat roof and a mix of wood, concrete, and glass materials. The front yard is landscaped with a large central tree, circular seating area, and geometric stepping stones leading to the main entrance. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a shaded pergola with lounge chairs, and a row of tall, slender trees providing privacy along the perimeter. The building itself has a clean, angular design with large windows and a two-story section on one side, likely containing additional living space or bedrooms. The property is accessed through a decorative metal gate and includes a driveway with parking spaces. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor living and seamless integration between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive landscaping, a swimming pool, and a mix of wood, concrete, and glass elements. The property is enclosed by a fence and features both front and rear outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large central tree, circular seating area, driveway, and decorative gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, pergola, and the row of tall privacy trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, two-story section, and the back fence with minimal landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the integration of the front and rear yards, with the pool, pergola, and main building structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
